passage_text: A developer of a high-risk artificial intelligence system shall make available to any deployer or other developer of the developer's high-risk artificial intelligence system: (a) A general description of the reasonably foreseeable uses and known harmful or inappropriate uses of the high-risk artificial intelligence system; (b) Documentation that is sufficient to allow the deployer to understand the outputs and monitor the performance of the high-risk artificial intelligence system for risks of algorithmic discrimination; (c) A high-level summary of the type of data used to train the high-risk artificial intelligence system.

obligation.subject: A developer of a high-risk artificial intelligence system
obligation.action: make available to any deployer or other developer documentation including description of uses, performance monitoring documentation, and training data summary
